title: Tournament Backend: Repository Queries + Analyzer Preflop/Postflop Stats
plan: Add get_tournament_hands_with_position(year, tournament_id) to repository.py returning hand_id, hero_position, net, blinds_bb, hero_stack for game_type='tournament'
Add get_tournament_hands_with_cards(year, tournament_id) to repository.py returning hand_id, hero_cards, hero_position, net, blinds_bb for tournament hands
Add get_tournament_daily_stats(year) to repository.py aggregating tournament hands by day for LeakFinder period comparison
Fix get_tournament_all_actions(): add ha.is_voluntary to the SELECT statement to unblock VPIP in positional analysis
Add game_type = 'tournament' class attribute to TournamentAnalyzer
Add _healthy_ranges and _postflop_healthy_ranges instance attributes in TournamentAnalyzer.__init__
Implement TournamentAnalyzer.get_preflop_stats() returning overall + by_position + by_day with health badges, reusing CashAnalyzer._analyze_preflop_hand()
Implement TournamentAnalyzer.get_postflop_stats() returning overall + by_street (Flop/Turn/River) + by_week with health badges, reusing CashAnalyzer._analyze_postflop_hand()
Add/update tests for new repository methods and analyzer methods
Run quality gates (tests pass, no regressions)
